payload.answer: Recorded the fetch failure (404 with 'network error') and a separate note that this missing-article reference was considered useful for memory architecture; no article content was stored.
payload.decision: Do not store article contents; store only the fetch failure metadata and that the missing article was noted as useful for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable entity identifiers were provided beyond the URL and error metadata.

payload.intent: Record context for a memory-system evaluation involving a failed article fetch (architecture usefulness).

memory_cards.statement: A simulated fetch attempt for https://example.com/missing returned a 404 with a 'network error' message.
The missing article context (the above URL) was referenced as useful for memory architecture during a memory system evaluation.

details: Committed only fetch-failure metadata and the evaluation-purpose note; did not infer article contents.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL with improved network handling and log the actual response body/headers if available.
Store additional fetch metadata (timestamp, request headers, retry count) to support later debugging.
If the article becomes available, replace the fetch-failure note with verified content using a new card.
